messages.subject: [R--gR] Live online course: “Mapas y operaciones espaciales (SIG) con R”, 20-24 de octubre, 2025
messages.subject_clean: [R--gR] Live online course: “Mapas y operaciones espaciales (SIG) con R”, 20-24 de octubre, 2025
messages.body_plain:
Dear colleagues,

Registration is now open for the course "Mapas y operaciones espaciales 
(SIG) con R". This course will be held live online (synchronous). 
Maximum 16 participants.

Dates: 20-24 de octubre, 2025, from 15:00 to 18:00 live sessions.

Language of the course: Spanish

More information can be found at 
https://www.transmittingscience.com/courses/ecology/mapas-y-analisis-espacial-sig-con-r/ 
or by writing to courses at transmittingscience.com

Bests wishes

Sole

-- 
Soledad De Esteban-Trivigno, PhD
Director
Transmitting Science
www.transmittingscience.com/courses

Bluesky @soledeesteban.bsky.social
X @SoleDeEsteban
Orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2049-0890
	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
